channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WEWORK] WeWork India adds 700,000+ sq. ft. across Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Chennai
item.description:
🔥 Trending

WeWork India Management Limited, one of India’s leading premium flexible workspace operators, announced the signing of five large-scale, long-term lease agreements across Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Chennai. The new centres will add ~12,000 desks to the company’s portfolio, structured through long-term commitments ranging from 10 to 20 years. This expansion spans five landmark developments across the region and is being delivered in partnership with leading landlords.

  • Addition of 700,000+ sq. ft. of Grade A office space across three key southern tech corridors
  • Partnerships with five prominent landlords, reinforcing WeWork India’s leadership in the country’s fastest-growing office markets
  • Five new centres will collectively add ~12,000 desks to the company’s portfolio
  • Long-term commitments ranging from 10 to 20 years, signaling confidence in sustained demand
  • Partnerships with five distinct landlords across cities and micro-markets, enabling asset owners to future-proof their buildings with high-quality workspace solutions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WeWork India Management Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [HAL] Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd Independent Director, Dr. S D Premkumar, Resigns to Contest in Tamilnadu Elections
item.description:
Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd (HAL) has announced the resignation of its Independent Director, Dr. S D Premkumar. The resignation is due to Premkumar's decision to contest in the upcoming Tamilnadu elections, which requires his full focus and commitment. Premkumar has expressed his gratitude for the opportunity to serve HAL and contribute to its growth and success. He is committed to ensuring a smooth transition and will assist in any manner required during this period.

  • Dr. S D Premkumar resigns from the position of Independent Director at HAL
  • Premkumar's resignation is due to his intention to contest in the upcoming Tamilnadu elections
  • Premkumar has expressed his gratitude for the opportunity to serve HAL
  • Premkumar is committed to ensuring a smooth transition
  • The resignation is in compliance with SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge Promotes Sunil Fernandes to Chief Operating Officer
item.description:
Coforge, an AI-native engineering services leader, has promoted Sunil Fernandes to the position of Chief Operating Officer (COO). Fernandes will oversee global delivery, admin, facilities, and internal IT services. He is based in Princeton, NJ and will continue to report to Coforge CEO, Sudhir Singh. Fernandes has been with Coforge since 2024, serving as Chief Delivery Officer before his promotion. He has over 30 years of experience in the industry and a track record of building industry practices and managing large global delivery organizations.

  • Sunil Fernandes promoted to Chief Operating Officer at Coforge
  • Fernandes will oversee global delivery, admin, facilities, and internal IT services
  • Fernandes has been with Coforge since 2024, serving as Chief Delivery Officer before his promotion
  • Fernandes has over 30 years of experience in the industry
  • Fernandes has a track record of building industry practices and managing large global delivery organizations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [UCOBANK] UCO Bank Reports Q-o-Q and Y-o-Y Growth in Provisional Business Figures as of 31.03.2026
item.description:
UCO Bank has released its provisional business figures for the quarter ending on 31.03.2026. The bank reported a 6.32% Q-o-Q growth and a significant 14.59% Y-o-Y growth in total business, which stood at 5.89 lakh crore rupees. Total advances saw a 7.38% Q-o-Q growth and a 19.09% Y-o-Y growth, reaching 2.62 lakh crore rupees. Total deposits also increased by 5.48% Q-o-Q and 11.22% Y-o-Y, amounting to 3.27 lakh crore rupees. Domestic advances and deposits showed robust growth of 8.84% and 4.11% Q-o-Q respectively, with advances reaching 2.34 lakh crore rupees and deposits at 3.04 lakh crore rupees. The CASA ratio for domestic operations remained relatively stable at 38.48%, while the CD ratio increased to 80.12%. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the bank's Statutory Central Auditors.

  • UCO Bank reports a Q-o-Q growth of 6.32% and a Y-o-Y growth of 14.59% in total business.
  • Total advances see a Q-o-Q growth of 7.38% and a Y-o-Y growth of 19.09%, reaching 2.62 lakh crore rupees.
  • Total deposits increase by 5.48% Q-o-Q and 11.22% Y-o-Y, amounting to 3.27 lakh crore rupees.
  • Domestic advances and deposits show strong growth of 8.84% and 4.11% Q-o-Q respectively.
  • CASA ratio for domestic operations remains stable at 38.48%, while CD ratio increases to 80.12%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UCO BANK | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UPHOT] UP Hotels Ltd Promoters Confirm No Encumbrance on Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, UP Hotels Ltd promoters have disclosed that no encumbrances were made directly or indirectly during the financial year ending March 31, 2026. Furthermore, as of March 31, 2026, no shares of the company were encumbered or pledged by the promoters.

  • UP Hotels Ltd promoters confirm no encumbrance on shares for FY 2025-2026.
  • No shares encumbered or pledged by promoters as of March 31, 2026.
  • Disclosure made in compliance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: U.P.HOTELS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [RANJITSE] Ranjit Securities Ltd Announces Book Closure for 1st EGM Regulation 2015
item.description:
Ranjit Securities Ltd has announced the closure of its Register of Members and Share Transfer Book from Tuesday 28th April, 2026 to Wednesday, 6th May 2026 (both days inclusive). This is in accordance with Regulation 42 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015 and Section 91 of Companies Act, 2013 for the purpose of 1st Extra Ordinary General Meeting scheduled on 6th May 2026.

  • Ranjit Securities Ltd announces book closure for 1st EGM Regulation 2015
  • Closure of Register of Members and Share Transfer Book from 28th April, 2026 to 6th May 2026
  • In accordance with Regulation 42 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015 and Section 91 of Companies Act, 2013
  • For the purpose of 1st Extra Ordinary General Meeting scheduled on 6th May 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ranjit Securities Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RANJITSE] Ranjit Securities Ltd. Announces 1st EGM for FY 26-27 with Special Business Proposals
item.description:
Ranjit Securities Ltd. has called for the 1st Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) for the financial year 2026-27. The meeting is scheduled to be held on 6th May 2026 at 11.00 A.M. at the registered office of the company in Indore, Madhya Pradesh. The agenda for the meeting includes the confirmation of M/s Ritesh Talreja & Associates, Chartered Accountants as the statutory Auditor for the FY 2025-26, re-appointment of Mr. Harman Singh Hora as a Chairman & Managing Director, and re-appointment of Mr. Mohammad Akhtar as an Independent Director.

  • Ranjit Securities Ltd. announces 1st EGM for FY 2026-27
  • Meeting to be held on 6th May 2026 at 11.00 A.M.
  • M/s Ritesh Talreja & Associates to be confirmed as statutory Auditor for FY 2025-26
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Harman Singh Hora as Chairman & Managing Director
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Mohammad Akhtar as an Independent Director

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ranjit Securities Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TAKE] TAKE Solutions Launches Rs. 50 Million Innovation Fund for AI, Deep Tech and Digital Health Startups
item.description:
Take Solutions Limited, a global domain-intensive technology company, announced the launch of its Innovation Fund with an initial corpus commitment of Rs. 50 million (Rs. 5 crore). The fund is aimed at identifying, investing in, and scaling high-potential startups operating at the convergence of Artificial Intelligence (AI), deep technology, and the rapidly expanding health and wellness sector. The initiative underscores Take Solutions’ strategic pivot towards enabling next-generation, technology-led business models while creating long-term value for stakeholders.

  • Targets $400–500 billion Indian health and wellness market driven by rising digital adoption and healthcare demand.
  • Focuses on AI diagnostics, longevity sciences, digital health platforms, and scalable technology infrastructure.
  • Provides strategic support beyond capital, including domain expertise, global networks, and go-to-market access.
  • Aims to create long-term shareholder value by investing in high-growth, innovation-led sectors.
  • Deploys capital across four key segments: AI & Data Intelligence, Longevity & Bio-Convergence, Digital Health Platforms, and Deep Tech Enablers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TAKE SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [VSTL] Vibhor Steel Tubes Secures CRISIL ‘BBB+/Stable/A2’ Rating for Rs 100 crore Bank Facilities
item.description:
Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd (VSTL) has been assigned ‘BBB+/Stable’ long-term rating and ‘Crisil A2’ short-term rating by CRISIL Ratings for its bank loan facilities aggregating to Rs 100 crore. The rating reflects VSTL’s established market position, consistent operational performance, and prudent financial management. The ‘Stable’ outlook indicates CRISIL’s expectation that the company will maintain a balanced capital structure and continue to benefit from steady demand across infrastructure, construction, and industrial sectors. The ratings are expected to enhance the company’s credibility among lenders and stakeholders, providing greater financial flexibility to support its expansion plans and working capital requirements.

  • CRISIL has assigned ‘BBB+/Stable’ long-term rating and ‘Crisil A2’ short-term rating to Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd’s bank loan facilities aggregating to Rs 100 crore.
  • The ratings reflect VSTL’s established market position, consistent operational performance, and prudent financial management.
  • The ‘Stable’ outlook indicates CRISIL’s expectation that the company will maintain a balanced capital structure and continue to benefit from steady demand across infrastructure, construction, and industrial sectors.
  • The ratings are expected to enhance the company’s credibility among lenders and stakeholders, providing greater financial flexibility to support its expansion plans and working capital requirements.
  • VSTL recently commenced supply of the Electric Resistance Welded (ERW) and Galvanized (GI) Pipes produced from its greenfield plant located at Sundargarh in Odisha.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [GOLDIAM] Goldiam International Ltd Expands ORIGEM Lab-Grown Diamond Jewellery Retail Presence with 2 New Stores
item.description:
Goldiam International Ltd has announced the opening of its 22nd and 23rd retail stores for lab-grown diamond jewellery under the brand name ‘ORIGEM’. The new stores are located at Shop No 2, Ground Floor, Sama Towers, Municipal no – 3-6-365/A, Himayathnagar, Hyderabad 500029 and No:27, Aljosan, New BEL Road, Bangalore, 560054. This expansion aligns with the company's long-term strategy of strengthening customer engagement and expanding its retail presence across key markets.

  • Goldiam International Ltd has opened its 22nd and 23rd retail stores for lab-grown diamond jewellery under the brand name ‘ORIGEM’.
  • The new stores are located in Hyderabad and Bangalore.
  • This expansion is in line with the company's long-term strategy of strengthening customer engagement and expanding its retail presence.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOLDIAM INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: New Launch
